current_state_before_change.dev_success_effect: Publish GHCR Dev runs after CI Dev success on dev
current_state_before_change.main_promotion_path: manual Promote Main Runtime workflow updates release/main-promote, then maintainer merges PR into main

changes: Added workflow_run trigger on successful CI Dev completion for dev
Added automatic promotion PR creation or reuse for release/main-promote -> main
Updated README and main flow documentation to describe explicit promotion behavior
intentional_non_changes: No direct auto-push from dev to main
No CI Main Runtime or GHCR publish workflow changes
No live workflow run or automated test execution

risks: First live GitHub Actions run is still required to confirm permissions and PR creation behavior
Branch protection or token scope may require follow-up adjustment
recommendation: Use the next successful dev run as the first live confirmation of automatic promotion branch and PR refresh behavior.
